title: The NEW Surprising Number of Steam Games that Use GenAI — Totally Human Media
description: A year ago, I poked around Steam to see  how many game developers were disclosing usage of Generative AI . It was around 1,000, which seemed like a lot to me at the time. If memory serves, that was about 1.1% of the entire Steam library, which has since seen 20,000+ more titles appear. I've been fol
